subcodes.title: Words to the friends spoken around Dec. 1907
subcodes.first_line: There were certain tribes in the old times, which no longer exist, such as Samaris or Pharisiyan.... These people believed that the Logos of that peerless Essence had been made flesh. That is, lahut had become nasut.
subcodes.first_line_orig: در زمان قدیم طوایف مختلفه بوده اند از جمله سامری ها که امروز نیستند و همچنین فریسیان
subcodes.subjects: @interconnectedness; all things involved in all things; chain of being, @the lower is unable to comprehend the higher, @Christian doctrine and practice, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @Manifestation of God as mediator, @anthropomorphism
